rulings.Case Title: NEMEZIO SILVEIRA BARROS VS. SAMNANG SAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Due To Non Compliance With Court Orders Or, In The Alternative, Issue Sanctions , And Evidence Sanctions As Against Plaintiff Nemezio Silveira; Rrequest For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 8, 2011. Line 3. DEFENDANT SAMNANG SAN, SAN SIENG Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Due To Non Compliance With Court Orders Or, In The Alternative, Issue Sanctions , And Evidence Sanctions As Against Plaintiff Nemezio Silveira. Sanctions in the amount of $2,400.00 is granted. Half of sanctions award to be paid by plaintiff and half by plaintiff's counsel Michael Silvers. Sanctions to be remitted to defense counsel within 30 days from today's date. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID TETER VS. SHAWN DOLGIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses And For Sanctions; Declaration; Seperate Statement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 8, 2011. Line 5. PLAINTIFF DAVID TETER'S renotice of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses And For Sanctions. Plaintiff's motion to compel discovery responses and sanctions is denied. The subpoena is averbroad and does not sufficiently describe the documents to be produced. See Calcon Space Facility v. Sup. Crt., (1997) 53 Cal app. Fourth 216,222. = (302/LMG)
